medical_history.history_of_present_illness: 46,XX SRY-negative karyotypes, concurrent referral with severe scrotal congenital hypospadias, later developed gynecomastia and signs of inchoate puberty with axillary and genital body hair growth
medical_history.past_medical_history: Hypergonadotropic hypogonadism with low free and total serum testosterone and elevated levels of sex hormone-binding globulin (SHBG), follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH), luteinizing hormone (LH) and normal, but marginally increased, estradiol
medical_history.family_history: Father had duplications upstream of SOX9, father's sister had severe psychological and alcohol abuse problems, committed completed suicide at the age of 26 years

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Abdomino-pelvico-scrotal ultrasonography and magnetic resonance imaging revealed a cystic ovotestis on the right side and an atrophic testis on the left side of the scrotum and a normal prostate of appropriate size and localization
